mapper.select: SELECT id, name, slug, created_at, updated_at FROM t_category ORDER BY id
SELECT id, name, slug, created_at, updated_at FROM t_category WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, slug, created_at, updated_at FROM t_category WHERE slug = #{slug}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_category (id, name, slug) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{slug})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_category SET name = #{name}, slug = #{slug} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM t_category WHERE name = #{name}
